definitions: see 香河縣|香河县[Xiang1 he2 Xian4]
Xianghe, a county in Langfang City 廊坊市[Lang2 fang2 Shi4], Hebei
mythical bird with one eye and one wing
see also 鰈鶼|鲽鹣[die2 jian1]
lit. a pair of mythical birds who depend on each other
(bird species of China) black-naped monarch (Hypothymis azurea)
see 龍亭區|龙亭区[Long2 ting2 Qu1]
Longting, a district of Kaifeng City 開封市|开封市[Kai1 feng1 Shi4], Henan
